subject: [RFC PATCH 33/40] PM: hibernate: walk per-superpageblock free lists in mark_free_pages

reviews.author: Rafael J. Wysocki
reviews.summary: Suggested breaking down the code into a separate function to improve readability, and proposed a specific refactoring approach.

2026-05-20.patch_summary: This RFC patch proposes a change to the hibernate function mark_free_pages() to handle the new superpageblock (SPB) free lists introduced by the SPB rework. The existing per-page walk is wrapped in an SPB iteration loop, and when there are no SPBs (e.g., in unpopulated hotplug zones), it falls back to the zone-level free list.
